detectors.description:
Freebie.GetFreebie() (Freebie.sol#17-33) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- msg.sender.transfer(this.balance) (Freebie.sol#29)
detectors.markdown:
[Freebie.GetFreebie()](Freebie.sol#L17-L33) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [msg.sender.transfer(this.balance)](Freebie.sol#L29)

detectors.description: Freebie.Command(address,bytes) (Freebie.sol#53-65) ignores return value by adr.call.value(msg.value)(data) (Freebie.sol#63)

Freebie.Command(address,bytes).adr (Freebie.sol#53) lacks a zero-check on :
		- adr.call.value(msg.value)(data) (Freebie.sol#63)

Version constraint ^0.4.19 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.19 (Freebie.sol#1)

detectors.description:
Low level call in Freebie.Command(address,bytes) (Freebie.sol#53-65):
	- adr.call.value(msg.value)(data) (Freebie.sol#63)
Function Freebie.Command(address,bytes) (Freebie.sol#53-65) is not in mixedCase
Variable Freebie.Owner (Freebie.sol#9) is not in mixedCase
Function Freebie.GetFreebie() (Freebie.sol#17-33) is not in mixedCase

Command(address,bytes) should be declared external:
	- Freebie.Command(address,bytes) (Freebie.sol#53-65)
